# FrameLane Documentation

> FrameLane is a video editing API for AI agents. Create render jobs, manage assets, and deliver finished video — all via API.

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://docs.framelane.io/introduction): Welcome to FrameLane — the video editing API for AI agents.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.framelane.io/quickstart): Make your first render in under 5 minutes.
- [Assets](https://docs.framelane.io/concepts/assets): Source media management — upload, metadata, lifecycle.
- [Jobs](https://docs.framelane.io/concepts/jobs): Render pipeline — create, track, and retrieve output.
- [Edits](https://docs.framelane.io/concepts/edits): Composable edit operations — trim, caption, overlay, mix, watermark.
- [Templates](https://docs.framelane.io/concepts/templates): Reusable edit lists with variable slots.
- [Webhooks](https://docs.framelane.io/concepts/webhooks): Real-time job lifecycle events.
- [Captions Guide](https://docs.framelane.io/guides/captions): Generate, style, and burn-in subtitles.
- [Overlays Guide](https://docs.framelane.io/guides/overlays): Position logos, lower-thirds, and graphics.
- [Long-Running Jobs](https://docs.framelane.io/guides/long-running-jobs): Retries, idempotency, and progress tracking.
- [MCP Integration](https://docs.framelane.io/integrations/mcp): Use FrameLane tools from any MCP-compatible agent.
- [Python SDK](https://docs.framelane.io/integrations/sdk-python): Official Python client.
- [TypeScript SDK](https://docs.framelane.io/integrations/sdk-typescript): Official TypeScript/Node.js client.
- [API Reference](https://docs.framelane.io/api-reference/overview): REST API overview, auth, errors.

## OpenAPI Specification

- [OpenAPI YAML](https://docs.framelane.io/openapi.yaml)
